name: Koren Saida
goals: Crush the Alpine Loop (40 miles, 4,200 ft gain — 8.5 mi at 6% avg grade)
Dominate Emigration Canyon climbs in SLC
Be fast and comfortable on 2-hour sustained climbing efforts
Close the gap between 5-min power (270W) and 20-min power (245W) — improve pacing on long climbs

target_events.name: Alpine Loop
target_events.location: Provo Canyon / American Fork Canyon, Utah
target_events.key_segment: Sundance to Cascade Springs — 8.5 miles at 6% avg grade

coaching_notes: Strong sprint/1-min power relative to FTP suggests good fast-twitch. Key limitiation: 5-min to 20-min power drop (270→245W) indicates pacing issues on sustained climbs. Training should focus on threshold endurance and pacing discipline for 20-40 min efforts at 88-95% FTP.
